channel.title: Trump on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Trump on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Despite Trump’s Call to Release UAP Files, Navy Denies Appeal for 78 Classified UAP Photographs
item.description:
The U.S. Navy has formally denied an appeal seeking the release of 78 photographs designated as “unidentified aerial phenomena” (UAP). This decision upholds a previous denial of a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request filed by The Black Vault. The Navy cited classification under Executive Order 13526 and the UAP Classification Guide as the reason for withholding the images. Despite public calls for transparency and a former president’s stated desire to release such files, the Navy’s appeal authority deferred to the Original Classification Authority, stating that no portion of the photographs could be released.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/despite-trumps-call-to-release-uap-files-navy-denies-appeal-for-78-classified-uap-photographs
